info.name: Unnamed Project API
info.description: API collection for Unnamed Project - NestJS backend with Clerk authentication

request.description: Public endpoint - Returns the health status of the API.

Protected endpoint - Returns the authenticated user's information from Clerk.

Response includes:
- userId
- sessionId
- orgId (optional)
- orgRole (optional)
- orgSlug (optional)

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token in the Authorization header.

Protected endpoint - Returns home page stats for the authenticated user's organization.

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Returns all BigQuery datasets and their tables for the authenticated user's organization.

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.
The organization's GCP project must be in 'active' status.

exec: pm.test('Response data is an array', function () {
pm.test('Each dataset has datasetId and tables', function () {
pm.test('Each table has tableId and type', function () {

request.description:
Protected endpoint - Returns only the dataset IDs for the authenticated user's organization.

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Creates a new BigQuery dataset.

Body:
- datasetId (required): The ID for the new dataset
- location (optional): GCP region, e.g. 'US', 'EU'
- description (optional): Description for the dataset

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Executes a write (DML) query against BigQuery.

Body:
- query (required): SQL DML statement (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, CREATE, etc.)

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Executes a read-only SELECT query against BigQuery with pagination.

Body:
- query (required): SQL SELECT statement
- startIndex (required): Pagination offset (0-based)
- maxResults (required): Number of rows to return (20, 50, or 100)

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Reads metadata (sheet names, headers, sample rows) from an uploaded Excel file without creating a table.

Body (multipart/form-data):
- file: The Excel (.xlsx) file

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Returns all tables in a given BigQuery dataset.

Path variables:
- dataset_id: The BigQuery dataset ID (e.g. shopify_raw)

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Returns detailed information for a specific BigQuery table.

Path variables:
- dataset_id: The BigQuery dataset ID (e.g. shopify_raw)
- table_id: The BigQuery table ID (e.g. orders)

Response includes:
- tableId, datasetId, type (TABLE | VIEW)
- description
- schema: array of fields with name, type, mode, description, nested fields
- rowCount, sizeBytes
- createdAt, lastModifiedAt (ISO 8601)
- location (e.g. US)
- partitioning (optional): type, field, requireFilter
- clustering (optional): fields array
- viewQuery (optional, VIEW type only)

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

response.name: Success - TABLE
response.body:
{
  "data": {
    "tableId": "orders",
    "datasetId": "shopify_raw",
    "type": "TABLE",
    "description": "Raw Shopify orders",
    "schema": [
      { "name": "id", "type": "INTEGER", "mode": "REQUIRED", "description": "Order ID" },
      { "name": "customer_id", "type": "INTEGER", "mode": "NULLABLE", "description": null },
      { "name": "total_price", "type": "FLOAT", "mode": "NULLABLE", "description": null },
      { "name": "created_at", "type": "TIMESTAMP", "mode": "NULLABLE", "description": null },
      { "name": "tags", "type": "STRING", "mode": "REPEATED", "description": null }
    ],
    "rowCount": 12345,
    "sizeBytes": 67890,
    "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
    "lastModifiedAt": "2024-06-01T12:00:00.000Z",
    "location": "US",
    "partitioning": { "type": "DAY", "field": "created_at", "requireFilter": false },
    "clustering": { "fields": ["customer_id"] },
    "viewQuery": null
  },
  "statusCode": 200
}

response.name: Success - VIEW
response.body:
{
  "data": {
    "tableId": "daily_summary",
    "datasetId": "shopify_raw",
    "type": "VIEW",
    "description": "Daily order totals",
    "schema": [
      { "name": "date", "type": "DATE", "mode": "NULLABLE", "description": null },
      { "name": "total_revenue", "type": "FLOAT", "mode": "NULLABLE", "description": null }
    ],
    "rowCount": null,
    "sizeBytes": null,
    "createdAt": "2024-03-01T00:00:00.000Z",
    "lastModifiedAt": "2024-06-01T12:00:00.000Z",
    "location": "US",
    "partitioning": null,
    "clustering": null,
    "viewQuery": "SELECT DATE(created_at) as date, SUM(total_price) as total_revenue FROM shopify_raw.orders GROUP BY 1"
  },
  "statusCode": 200
}

response.name: GCP Not Active

exec: pm.test('Each schema field has name, type and mode', function () {
pm.test('type is TABLE or VIEW', function () {

request.description:
Protected endpoint - Returns paginated rows from a BigQuery table.

Path variables:
- dataset_id: The BigQuery dataset ID
- table_id: The BigQuery table ID

Query params:
- startIndex (optional, default 0): Pagination offset
- maxResults (optional, default 50): Number of rows to return

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Creates a new BigQuery table with an explicit schema.

Path variables:
- dataset_id: The BigQuery dataset ID

Body:
- tableId (required): The ID for the new table
- schema (required): Array of SchemaField objects (name, type, mode, description)
- description (optional): Description for the table

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

formdata.description: CSV, Excel (.xlsx), or JSON file to upload
Row number to start reading data from (Excel only, optional)

request.description:
Protected endpoint - Creates a new BigQuery table by uploading a CSV, Excel, or JSON file.

Path variables:
- dataset_id: The BigQuery dataset ID

Body (multipart/form-data):
- file (required): The data file
- tableId (required): The ID for the new table
- fileType (required): One of 'csv', 'excel', 'json'
- description (optional): Description for the table
- sheet (optional, Excel only): Sheet name to import
- startRow (optional, Excel only): Row number where data begins

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Updates a BigQuery table's description and/or field descriptions.

Path variables:
- dataset_id: The BigQuery dataset ID
- table_id: The BigQuery table ID

Body:
- description (optional): New table description
- fieldDescriptions (optional): Array of { path, description } objects for column descriptions

Returns 204 No Content on success.

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Permanently deletes a BigQuery table.

Path variables:
- dataset_id: The BigQuery dataset ID
- table_id: The BigQuery table ID

Returns 204 No Content on success.

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Returns the distinct values for a given column in a BigQuery table (used to populate filter dropdowns).

Path variables:
- dataset_id: The BigQuery dataset ID
- table_id: The BigQuery table ID
- column: The column name

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Returns all dashboards for the authenticated user's organization, including favourite status.

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Creates a new empty dashboard.

Body:
- title (required): The dashboard title

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Returns a single dashboard with all its widgets.

Path variables:
- dashboard_id: The dashboard ID

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Renames a dashboard.

Path variables:
- dashboard_id: The dashboard ID

Body:
- title (required): The new dashboard title

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Permanently deletes a dashboard and all its widgets.

Path variables:
- dashboard_id: The dashboard ID

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Toggles the favourite status of a dashboard for the current user.

Path variables:
- dashboard_id: The dashboard ID

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Creates a copy of an existing dashboard including all its widgets.

Path variables:
- dashboard_id: The dashboard ID to duplicate

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Adds a new widget to a dashboard.

Path variables:
- dashboard_id: The dashboard ID

Body:
- type (required): Widget type — currently only 'report'
- config (required): WidgetReportConfigDto — see schema
- x, y, w, h (required): Grid position and size (integers)

Config fields:
- title: Widget title
- dataSource: { datasetId, tableId }
- dimension: Time/category column for X axis
- dimensionGranularity: ['day' | 'month' | 'year']
- groupBy: Optional secondary grouping column
- groupByGranularity: ['day' | 'month' | 'year']
- groupByIncludeEmpty: Whether to include null groups
- metrics: Array of { id, operation (sum|avg|count|count_distinct|min|max), column }
- orderBy: { target, direction ('asc'|'desc') }
- visualization: { type ('bar'|'line'|'pie'|'single_metric'), stacked }
- filters: Array of filter objects

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Updates the grid positions and sizes of multiple widgets at once (used when rearranging a dashboard layout).

Path variables:
- dashboard_id: The dashboard ID

Body:
- widgets (required): Array of { id, x, y, w, h } — each widget's ID and its new grid coordinates

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Updates a single widget's configuration and/or position.

Path variables:
- dashboard_id: The dashboard ID
- widget_id: The widget ID

Body (all fields optional):
- config: WidgetReportConfigDto — updated widget configuration
- x, y, w, h: Updated grid position/size

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Removes a widget from a dashboard.

Path variables:
- dashboard_id: The dashboard ID
- widget_id: The widget ID

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Validates a widget ReportConfig without executing the query. Useful for checking config correctness before saving.

Body: ReportConfigDto — the widget query configuration to validate.

Returns 200 with validation result.

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Executes a single widget query and returns the result data.

Body: ReportConfigDto
- dataSource: { datasetId, tableId }
- dimension: Column for X axis / time axis (optional)
- dimensionGranularity: ['day' | 'month' | 'year'] (optional)
- groupBy: Secondary grouping column (optional)
- groupByGranularity: ['day' | 'month' | 'year'] (optional)
- groupByIncludeEmpty: Whether to include null groups
- metrics: Array of { id, operation (sum|avg|count|count_distinct|min|max), column }
- orderBy: { target, direction } (optional)
- filters: Array of filter objects (optional)

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Protected endpoint - Executes multiple widget queries in a single request (used when loading an entire dashboard).

Body:
- queries (required): Array of ReportConfigDto objects

Returns results in the same order as the input queries.

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token with an active organization.

Send a message to the analytics agent and get a response.

Body:
- messages: Array of message objects with role and content
- resourceId: The user's ID (used to scope memory)
- threadId: (optional) Thread ID to continue an existing conversation

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token.

List all conversation threads for the analytics agent.

Query params:
- agentId: The agent ID to filter threads by

Requires a valid Clerk Bearer token.

Public endpoint - Receives Clerk webhook events.

Supported events:
- organization.created: Provisions a new organization
- organization.deleted: Deprovisions an organization

Requires valid Svix headers for webhook signature verification.
